detail.authRequired: Please sign in to view your order details
detail.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this order.
detail.successSubheading: You've got your {count, plural, one {domain} other {domains}} and here {count, plural, one {is the NFT} other {are the NFTs}}
detail.mintingSubheading: {count, plural, one {Your domain is registered. We're minting its NFT now — you can manage it right away.} other {Your domains are registered. We're minting their NFTs now — you can manage them right away.}}
detail.renewedSubheading: {count, plural, one {Your domain's registration has} other {Your domains' registrations have}} been extended.
detail.importSubmittedSubheading: {count, plural, one {Your import request is} other {Your import requests are}} on the way. Imports usually take a few days (about 5-7) — you can contact your previous registrar to speed it up.
detail.failedSubheading: Something went wrong while processing this order. Review the details below.
detail.shareDialogDescription: Send this message to the recipient so they can begin managing their domain.
detail.shareManageDefault: Begin managing your domain on Namefi.
detail.shareManageMessage: I've registered {domains} for you on Namefi. Begin managing {count, plural, one {your domain} other {your domains}} here:
detail.shareManageMessageRenew: I've renewed {domains} for you on Namefi. Begin managing {count, plural, one {your domain} other {your domains}} here:

processing.processingDomains: Processing {count, plural, one {# domain} other {# domains}}
processing.descItemsImportOnly: We are submitting the import request. This typically takes 5-7 days. You can contact your old registrar to expedite. If the domain is locked, you may need to unlock it first.
processing.descItemsImportAndRegister: We are registering your domains and submitting import requests. Imports typically take 5-7 days. You can contact your old registrar to expedite. If a domain is locked, you may need to unlock it first.
processing.descItemsDefault: Each domain is being submitted to the registrar.
processing.descItemsRenewOnly: We are extending {count, plural, one {your domain's registration} other {each domain's registration}} on-chain.
processing.descPostProcessingImport: Your old registrar will contact you to confirm the import. This typically takes 5-7 days.
processing.descPostProcessingDefault: We are refreshing indexes and preparing your on-chain records.
processing.descPostProcessingRenew: We are finalizing the new expiration on-chain.
processing.descImportOnly: We are initiating the import. This typically takes 5-7 days. You can contact your old registrar to expedite.
processing.descImportAndRegister: We are processing your domains. Imports typically take 5-7 days.
processing.descRenewOnly: Hang tight while we extend your {count, plural, one {domain} other {domains}}.
processing.descDefault: Hang on tight while we wrap things up.

notFound.title: Order not found
notFound.description: The order you are looking for could not be found. Please check the order ID and try again.

aiGenerations.title: Just AIng by Namefi™
aiGenerations.description: While your order was processing, we prepared a logo preview for your brand(s). Explore more styles and marketing images in Just AIng.

details.heading: Order Details
details.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this order.
details.actionRequiredAll: All items in this order require further action from your side.
details.actionRequiredSingle: The domain <highlight>{domain}</highlight> requires further action from your side.
details.actionRequiredSome: {count} of {total} items in this order require further action from your side.
details.actionRequiredDialogDescription: Some items in this order require action. Please review the details and take necessary actions.
details.walletNotLinked: This wallet isn't linked to your account.
details.techDialogDescription: Copy any field by clicking the copy icon.
details.domainUnlockRequiredDescription: Unlock the domain at your registrar, then confirm here so we can continue.
details.authCodeRequiredDescription: Enter the new auth code from your registrar to continue the import.
details.cancelThisItemDescription: If you no longer want to proceed, canceling will stop processing this item.
details.requiredActionAuthCode: Provide a new auth code to continue the import.
details.requiredActionUnlock: Confirm the domain is unlocked at your current registrar.
details.toastAuthCodeUpdated: Auth code updated. We are resuming your import.
details.toastUnlockConfirmed: Unlock confirmed. We are resuming the request.
details.toastItemCancelled: Item cancelled. We are stopping the request.
details.toastEnterAuthCode: Enter the auth code to continue.
details.failureTimeoutAuthCodeDuration: Auth code was not updated for {duration}, so the order item was canceled.
details.failureTimeoutLockedDuration: Domain stayed locked for {duration}, so the order item was canceled.
details.failureTimeoutAuthCode: Auth code update timed out, so the order item was canceled.
details.failureTimeoutLocked: Domain stayed locked too long, so the order item was canceled.
details.failureAdminAuthCode: Auth code update required and support canceled the request.
details.failureAdminLocked: Domain was locked and support canceled the request.
details.failureUserAuthCode: Auth code update required and you canceled the request.
details.failureUserLocked: Domain was locked and you canceled the request.
